name: Cpm
description_short: CPM (College Preparatory & Math) is an educational technology company providing online math curriculum and resources for K-12 students, not a consumer finance provider.
description_long:
CPM (College Preparatory & Mathematics) is an educational organization that develops and delivers mathematics curriculum for K-12 students. The company operates multiple web properties including homework.cpm.org and technology.cpm.org, indicating a focus on digital learning platforms and educational tools. Based on the website infrastructure showing login functionality, cookie management for user preferences, and references to Desmos integration (a mathematical graphing tool), CPM provides online learning management and educational content delivery. The organization uses standard educational technology platforms including HubSpot for customer management, Cloudflare for content delivery, and Vimeo for video instruction.

CPM's services appear centered on delivering mathematics education through digital platforms, with user accounts, video content, and interactive tools. The cookie infrastructure suggests the platform tracks student progress, remembers user preferences across sessions, and provides personalized learning experiences. The integration with external tools like Desmos indicates CPM combines its own curriculum with established mathematical software.

The company's categorization as a "payday-alternative" on CreditDoc is fundamentally incorrect. CPM is an educational institution with no connection to consumer finance, lending, credit, or payday lending alternatives. There is no evidence of financial products, lending services, APR rates, or consumer credit offerings.

This is a clear miscategorization error. CPM should not be listed in any consumer finance category on CreditDoc, as it is exclusively an educational company. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks

cons: Completely miscategorized as financial services company when it is an education company

best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: CPM is NOT a consumer finance company and should not appear on CreditDoc. This is an educational mathematics curriculum provider with no lending, credit, or financial products. The listing should be removed entirely from the finance platform.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
